overview: flowebdesign is a premium full-stack SaaS web application for a web development agency. Features a high-converting marketing site with 6 pages, Internet Identity authentication, Motoko backend for contact lead storage, and an admin dashboard for managing client inquiries.
features: Premium dark glassmorphism design with purple-blue-cyan gradients
Hero section with high-impact headline and CTAs
Services showcase (Frontend, Backend, Full-Stack) with detail cards
Interactive portfolio with hover effects and case study metrics
Contact form wired to Motoko canister for persistent lead storage
Internet Identity authentication for admin access
Protected admin dashboard with contact leads table and stats
Dynamic navbar with login/logout auth state
Smooth Framer Motion animations and scroll effects
Floating WhatsApp button for instant client contact
